name: transaction-private-mortgage
rationale: Private mortgage scenario (Vienna's name suggests private-mortgage focus, but the canonical_map structure treats all mortgages uniformly). Borrower being placed with private lender — TT='Private Mortgage'. Layer 3: are private mortgages differentiated in canonical_map / workflow / risk-classification, or treated identically to bank-lender refis? Product-design item.
notes: Single-event sequence. PML = Private Mortgage Link is the product name; the system was built for private deals primarily. Confirm vs spec in Phase 4.
